problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: If Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI is applied to essential, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
